description_long: This ornate armchair features a luxurious, tufted backrest upholstered in a rich, brown satin-like fabric, accented with deep buttoning for a classic, Victorian look. The seat cushion is wide and plush, covered in a floral-patterned fabric that contrasts elegantly with the smooth back and arms. The frame is elaborately carved with intricate scrollwork and floral motifs, finished in a gold tone that enhances its regal appearance. The armrests are padded and upholstered, curving outward and supported by the same decorative golden woodwork as the frame. The back of the chair is also upholstered, with vertical paneling and a continuation of the ornate crest at the top. The legs are short, robust, and carved, matching the overall opulent style of the piece.
description: An ornate, Victorian-style armchair with a tufted brown backrest, floral seat cushion, and intricately carved gold frame and armrests.
description_view_0: Front angle showing the tufted backrest, floral seat cushion, and detailed gold carvings on the frame and armrests.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the vertically paneled, upholstered back and the elaborate gold crest at the top.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the curved, padded armrest and the ornate gold woodwork along the side and back.
description_view_3: Direct front view displaying the full width of the seat, the tufted backrest, and the intricate carvings on the frame and arms.
attribute_armrest_design: padded and upholstered with ornate carved wood supports
attribute_backrest_style: high, tufted, and rounded with elaborate carved crest
attribute_upholstery_pattern: tufted leather backrest and floral print seat cushion
